//: Example Claude Code hook registration for Cerberus. Copy into your project's .claude/settings.json (or merge the `hooks` block). Replace /ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/cerberus with the real path to this repo. Start the engine first: `npm run engine`.
//pretooluse: PreToolUse is the hard gate (allow/deny). Its timeout MUST be >= the engine's HITL TTL (default 300000ms) so a human has time to decide — set it a little higher.
//posttooluse: PostToolUse feeds tool results to the contamination engine. It never blocks; keep its timeout tight (content scan is sub-ms). The SAME command serves both events — the hook routes by hook_event_name internally.
